targets.expr:
(
  sum by (fish) (
    increase( fish_caught_total{job=~"$job", location="Пруд"}[7d] )
  )
  + on (fish)
  sum by (fish) (
    increase( bot_command_total{job=~"$job", command="cast", result="caught", location="1"}[7d] )
  )
)
or sum by (fish) ( increase(fish_caught_total{job=~"$job", location="Пруд"}[7d]) )
or sum by (fish) ( increase(bot_command_total{job=~"$job", command="cast", result="caught", location="1"}[7d]) )
